artifacts.summary: Research report documenting GNOME dconf power settings for screen timeout and AC sleep configuration in NixOS
2-phase implementation plan to update AC sleep timeout from 15 to 60 minutes in home.nix
Implementation summary with verification steps

active_projects.completion_summary: Changed AC power sleep timeout from 15 minutes to 60 minutes in home.nix dconf settings, allowing processes to continue for up to an hour on AC power while screen still blanks after 5 minutes.

artifacts.summary: Research report covering Niri 2025 features, missing components, configuration enhancements, window rules, and Waybar improvements while maintaining GNOME compatibility
5-phase implementation plan for Niri compositor upgrades with GNOME compatibility
Implementation summary documenting all Niri upgrades and new features

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented comprehensive Niri compositor upgrades including floating window support (Mod+W), visual enhancements (shadows, rounded corners, prefer-no-csd), enhanced Waybar with workspace icons and bluetooth/idle modules, screenshot annotation pipeline (grim+slurp+satty), and kanshi dynamic monitor management. GNOME Desktop compatibility fully maintained.

artifacts.summary: Research report covering sioyek window behavior options: should_launch_new_window, close_window keybinding, and analysis of native support vs wrapper script for focus-existing behavior
1-phase implementation plan for sioyek multi-window PDF configuration
Implementation summary with verification steps

active_projects.completion_summary: Configured sioyek PDF viewer for multi-window behavior with should_launch_new_window preference, close_window q keybinding, and --reuse-instance desktop entry flag. Different PDFs now open in separate windows.

artifacts.summary: Research report identifying Wayland focus-stealing prevention and MuxWindow:gui_window() API issues as root causes, with fix recommendations
Follow-up research on WezTerm cross-window navigation with 4 solution approaches and comprehensive GitHub issue analysis
Compositor-specific solutions for cross-window tab navigation: Niri IPC and GNOME D-Bus extension with implementation sketches
5-phase implementation plan for GNOME cross-window tab navigation using activate-window-by-title extension
Implementation summary with verification results and post-rebuild testing instructions

active_projects.completion_summary: Fixed WezTerm cross-window tab navigation on GNOME/Wayland by adding activate-window-by-title GNOME Shell extension and D-Bus fallback in wezterm.lua. Requires nixos-rebuild switch and re-login to activate.

artifacts.summary: Research report documenting WezTerm API for cross-window tab navigation using MuxTab:activate() and wezterm.action_callback
2-phase implementation plan for WezTerm global tab navigation using action_callback and MuxTab:activate()
Implementation summary with verification results for cross-window tab navigation

active_projects.completion_summary: Implemented cross-window global tab navigation in WezTerm by adding activate_global_tab() function that uses MuxTab:activate() and GuiWindow:focus() to navigate to tabs by their global position across all windows, matching the existing tab bar numbering.

artifacts.summary: Comprehensive research report covering swapDevices options, zram alternatives, size recommendations, and integration with earlyoom
3-phase plan covering swap configuration, build verification, and system activation
Additional research analyzing Task 26 implementation to inform swap configuration approach
Implementation summary with verification results and manual activation steps

active_projects.completion_summary: Configured 16GB swap file in NixOS configuration.nix with SSD TRIM optimization, creating a three-tier memory management system with earlyoom. Build verification passed; requires manual sudo nixos-rebuild switch to activate.

artifacts.summary: Research report comparing webcam recording options in nixpkgs, recommending cheese as the simplest solution
2-phase plan: add cheese to home.packages, then build and verify installation
Research report covering all three MCP servers (Astro Docs, Context7, Playwright) with installation requirements, configuration details, and NixOS-specific considerations
Research report on NixOS timezone configuration with automatic geolocation detection and California default fallback
